case_title: RUK SANA TASNEEN VS. HERMANN AUTRY et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT AUTRY, HERMANN

LAW AND MOTION 301, DEFENDANT HERMANN AUTRY'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED ON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT REIMBRUSE PLAINTIFF FOR FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN OBTAINING THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY IN A SEPARATELY NOTICED MOTION. Notice Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; Declarations Of Russell Davis, Herman Autry And Raymond Autry
Off Calendar May-15-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES- ATTY. DAVID FORAN OF THE LAW OFFICES OF JOSEPH SACRAMENTO, TEL. NO. 775-0891 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. RUSSELL M. DAVIS, TEL. NO. 409-5627 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS- DEFENDANT HERMANN AUTRY'S Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment IS GRANTED ON CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT REIMBRUSE PLAINTIFF FOR FEES AND COSTS INCURRED IN OBTAINING THE DEFAULT JUDGMENT FOR WHICH PLAINTIFF MAY APPLY IN A SEPARATELY NOTICED MOTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB/PM
